compatibilityLabel: React DOM 19.2.6 server/static behavior surface oracle

generation.method: checked runtime inventory plus exact npm tarballs and local Fast React DOM placeholders copied into a temporary node_modules tree
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per target, server/static scenario, and mode
generation.streamNormalization: stream probes record object shapes, callback labels, allReady resolution, and deterministic simple-markup bytes; raw timings are omitted

currentFastReactDomServerStatic.source: local packages/react-dom server/static entrypoints copied for unsupported placeholder comparison

deferredFizzBehavior.reason: Fast React does not yet implement the Fizz request, task, segment, boundary, abort, postpone, or resume model required by these React DOM APIs.
React DOM legacy markup, Suspense markers, streams, and static prerender output are recorded as target behavior; Fast React observations intentionally stop at structured unsupported placeholders.
Resume and resume-and-prerender scenarios record invalid postponed-state boundaries but do not define or implement a Fast React postponed-state token.

probeModes.reason: Default Node development captures server/static result shapes, diagnostics, and development Fizz marker details.
Default Node production captures the same server/static APIs with production CJS bundles selected by NODE_ENV.
The react-server condition records the throwing React Server Components boundary for every server/static subpath.
Production react-server branches are recorded separately because they load production throwing modules.

captures: legacy Fizz wrapper availability across server variants

scenarios.area: Explicit deferred Fizz Suspense marker behavior

captures: Web stream output for simple markup
postponed null shape for completed simple markup
callback error summaries without stack paths
Fast React placeholder boundaries for deferred Fizz work

@fast-react/react-dom.source: local workspace package copied for server/static placeholder comparison

@fast-react/react.source: local workspace package copied so Fast React DOM placeholder calls receive Fast React element objects
